sentence: go to the-internet.herokuapp.com/entry_ad, dismiss the popup ad that appears, then read the page content

workflow.name: On Browser Home Page
workflow.description: Start the process from a fresh browser tab.
triggers: If the current URL is chrome://new-tab-page/

workflow.name: On Entry Ad Page with Modal
workflow.description: The entry ad page has loaded, and the modal popup is visible.
triggers: If the current URL contains the-internet.herokuapp.com/entry_ad
If an element with ID 'modal' is visible
actions: Click a button with text 'Close' inside the element with ID 'modal'

workflow.name: Ad Dismissed, Content Visible
workflow.description: The popup ad has been dismissed, and the main page content is now visible and readable.
triggers: If the current URL contains the-internet.herokuapp.com/entry_ad
If an element with ID 'modal' is not visible
If an h3 element with text 'This is a modal window' is visible
actions: Terminate: The ad has been dismissed and the page content is visible.
